description: Runtime-owned AgentMail contract for AutoMindLab operator and agent mailboxes. This manifest records declared inboxes, domain intent, approval boundaries, and the service-envelope shape used by downstream products.

domains.purpose: Custom domain intended for production-grade email routing once DNS and provider verification are complete.
domains.notes: Declared by the repo owner. No API or DNS verification proof is checked into this repo yet.

mailboxes.purpose: Primary operator mailbox for runtime approvals, diagnostics, and human-visible coordination.
mailboxes.notes: User-declared mailbox. This repo does not claim live connectivity until AGENTMAIL_API_KEY-backed proof exists.

mailboxes.purpose: Dedicated agent mailbox for BMO-adjacent runtime messaging that still remains under host review.
mailboxes.notes: Supports a real agent identity while preserving host ownership of irreversible or externally visible actions.

webhooks.targetSurface: Future runtime-side inbound mail processor or downstream inbox bridge.
webhooks.notes: Do not configure until a typed inbound processor and operator-visible escalation path exist.

approvalBoundaries: Do not send or reply from any mailbox until the operator has confirmed the mailbox and provider credentials are live.
Do not treat user-declared mailboxes or domains as production-ready evidence.
Domain verification and webhook configuration require operator-visible review because they affect external routing.
notes: This manifest translates the AgentMail provider surface into runtime-owned contracts and runbooks. It does not store secrets and does not claim live message delivery without separate proof.
